wc_role.value: Group D dark horses at WC 2026, riding momentum from their Euro 2024 quarter-final run. Captained by Hakan Calhanoglu (Inter); star playmaker Arda Güler (Real Madrid). Coach: Vincenzo Montella.

opener_result.value: Lost their opener 0-2 to Australia (June 14, 2026, BC Place, Vancouver) despite 71.7% possession. Arda Güler took a WC-tournament-high 8 shots but was kept out by Australia keeper Patrick Beach (8 saves, record debut). Kenan Yildiz (Juventus) came on at half-time as an attacking sub and took 6 shots but couldn't score. Sit pointless in Group D (3rd/4th) alongside Paraguay.
